scores.correctness_notes: Fully correct - all three required sections present with accurate syntax. Service has override, command, startup, environment, on-check-failure. HTTP check has correct fields (override, level, period, timeout, threshold, http.url). Log target has correct type, location, services list, and labels. Extra details like backoff-* and on-success are valid Pebble fields.
scores.hallucination_notes: none - all parameters (backoff-delay, backoff-factor, backoff-limit, kill-delay, on-success, on-failure) are legitimate Pebble layer fields
